title: milla maritima
intro: Milla maritima, also known as sea squill, is a perennial plant native to the coastal regions of Europe and North Africa. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects, derived from its alkaloids and saponins. The health benefits of Milla maritima include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory conditions such as bronchitis, and support immune function. Milla maritima can be prepared in various herbal forms, including tinctures, capsules, and infusions, allowing for its medicinal properties to be utilized in a range of applications.
